    def test_heatmap_plot_generation(check_plot, tmp_path):
        # Mock data
        data = pd.DataFrame(
            {
                "gene": ["Gene1", "Gene2", "Gene3", "Gene4"],
                "Sample1": [1.2, 3.4, 0.5, 2.1],
                "Sample2": [1.1, 3.2, 0.6, 2.0],
                "Sample3": [4.5, 1.2, 3.3, 0.8],
                "Sample4": [4.6, 1.1, 3.2, 0.9],
            }
        )
    
        output_file = tmp_path / "heatmap.png"
    
        plotter = HeatmapPlot(theme="nature")
        fig = plotter.plot(
            data=data,
            index_col="gene",
            cluster_rows=True,
            cluster_cols=True,
            z_score=0,  # standardize rows
            output=str(output_file),
        )
    
        assert output_file.exists()
        assert output_file.stat().st_size > 0
